ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitching_data" (
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch thrown */,
  "prev_pitch" TEXT /* Previous pitch thrown */,
  "prev_type" TEXT /* Type of the previous pitch */,
  "stand" TEXT /* Batter's stance (R for right, L for left) */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls thrown before this pitch */,
  "strikes" INTEGER /* Number of strikes thrown before this pitch */,
  "runner" INTEGER /* Number of runners on base */,
  "outs_when_up" INTEGER /* Number of outs when the pitch was thrown */,
  "inning" INTEGER /* Inning when the pitch was thrown */,
  "run_diff" INTEGER /* Run difference at the time of the pitch */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "pitch_speed" REAL /* Speed of the pitch */,
  "pitch_result" TEXT /* Result of the pitch (e.g., strike, ball, foul, hit) */,
  "pitch_location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the pitch location */,
  "pitch_location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the pitch location */,
  "pitcher_hand" TEXT /* Hand of the pitcher (R for right, L for left) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_data_pitch_type FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_type") REFERENCES pitch_types ("pitch_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_data_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitcher_stats ("pitcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_data ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_data" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opposing team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the team is home or away */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win, loss, draw) */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire who officiated the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_data_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpire_data ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_types" (
  "pitch_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch type */,
  "pitch_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pitch */,
  "pitch_speed_range" TEXT /* Typical speed range for the pitch type */,
  "pitch_accuracy" REAL /* Typical accuracy of the pitch type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitch_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitcher_stats" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "pitcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the pitcher */,
  "games_pitched" INTEGER /* Number of games pitched */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ERA" REAL /* Earned Run Average */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Total innings pitched */,
  "hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Total hits allowed */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks issued */,
  "earned_runs" INTEGER /* Total earned runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the game state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game state */,
  "inning_range" TEXT /* Range of innings for the game state */,
  "average_run_difference" REAL /* Average run difference for the game state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitcher_game_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings the pitcher pitched in the game */,
  "pitches_thrown" INTEGER /* Total number of pitches thrown by the pitcher in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitcher_game_mapping_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_data ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitcher_game_mapping_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitcher_stats ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch sequence */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the pitch in the sequence */,
  "at_bat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the at-bat */,
  "batting_team" TEXT /* Team that was batting during the sequence */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Order of the batter in the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_sequences_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitching_data ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inning_data" (
  "inning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inning */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "inning_number" INTEGER /* Inning number */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored in the inning */,
  "inning_type" TEXT /* Type of the inning (top, bottom) */,
  "inning_events" TEXT /* Significant events during the inning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inning_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_data ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runner_data" (
  "runner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runner */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch */,
  "base" TEXT /* Base the runner is on (1B, 2B, 3B) */,
  "runner_speed" REAL /* Speed rating of the runner */,
  "batter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batter who was at bat */,
  "runner_result" TEXT /* Result for the runner (e.g., scored, out, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runner_data_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitching_data ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strike_zone_data" (
  "strike_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the strike zone data */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch */,
  "zone_top" REAL /* Top of the strike zone */,
  "zone_bottom" REAL /* Bottom of the strike zone */,
  "pitch_location" TEXT /* Location of the pitch relative to the strike zone */,
  "zone_width" REAL /* Width of the strike zone */,
  "zone_height" REAL /* Height of the strike zone */,
  "pitch_distance" REAL /* Distance of the pitch from the center of the strike zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strike_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strike_zone_data_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitching_data ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpire_calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire call */,
  "pitch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitch */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the umpire */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (strike, ball, foul) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy rating of the umpire's call */,
  "pitch_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the pitch (e.g., high, low, middle) */,
  "call_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the umpire's call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_umpire_calls_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpire_data ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_umpire_calls_pitch_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitch_id") REFERENCES pitching_data ("pitch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpire_data" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  "accuracy_rating" REAL /* Overall accuracy rating */,
  "umpire_position" TEXT /* Position of the umpire (e.g., home plate, first base) */,
  "umpire_type" TEXT /* Type of umpire (e.g., regular, substitute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)
